creator: doconnor@gsoft.com.au
text:
This library allows tcl apps to use GNU readline for their own use or for
and interactive session, eg
tclsh8.0
package require tclreadline
::tclreadline::Loop

(Very handy for fiddling around with Tcl!)

Fix: 

The port is available at http://www.gsoft.com.au/~doconnor/tclreadline-port.tar.gz
